SAMT-BU Docs brings together professional and technical documentation for the project **Connected Services for Children and Young People (SAMT-BU)**.

This site is open to everyone. Professionals, architects, developers and project partners will find use cases, architecture, frameworks and technical documentation here. Anyone can also contribute content.
